# packages/web

SvelteKit SSR frontend. TypeScript.

## Scaffold this package with:

```bash
cd packages/web
pnpm create svelte@latest .
# Choose: Skeleton project, TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier
pnpm add @haps/shared
```

## Key configuration:

- SSR must be enabled (default in SvelteKit — do not set `export const ssr = false`
  on event pages).
- Set `INTERNAL_API_URL` env var for SSR load() functions to call the API
  container-to-container (avoids going through Caddy in production).
- Set `PUBLIC_APP_URL` for building absolute URLs in OG tags.

## Scripts (auto-generated by create svelte, verify these):

```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite dev",
    "build": "vite build",
    "start": "node build",
    "lint": "eslint src",
    "typecheck": "svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json",
    "test": "vitest run"
  }
}
```

See @.claude/rules/frontend.md for OG tag requirements and component conventions.
See @docs/api-spec.md for the API endpoints to call.
